///<reference types="svelte" />
;function $$render() {

let count = $state(0);
let doubled = $derived(count * 2);

function increment() {
	count += 1;
}
;
async () => {

 { svelteHTML.createElement("button", { "onclick":increment,}); count; }
 { svelteHTML.createElement("p", {}); doubled; }
};
return { props: {} as Record<string, never>, exports: {}, bindings: __sveltets_$$bindings(''), slots: {}, events: {} }}
const StateRunes2__SvelteComponent_ = __sveltets_2_fn_component($$render());
/*Ωignore_startΩ*/type StateRunes2__SvelteComponent_ = ReturnType<typeof StateRunes2__SvelteComponent_>;
/*Ωignore_endΩ*/export default StateRunes2__SvelteComponent_;
